title: Jurassic World Reborn
description: Time to join the past with the present, enjoy a world filled with these dinosaurs!
body:
![Banner Header](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Jurassic_World_Reborn/BH_Jurassic_World_Reborn_Header.webp)
[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Jurassic_World_Reborn/BH_Jurassic_World_Reborn_Promo.webp)](https://tinyurl.com/amy67484)
![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Jurassic_World_Reborn/BH_Jurassic_World_Reborn_Description.webp)
---
Jurassic World Reborn is a dinosaur themed modpack, integrating the past with the present. Designed for players who want to bring back a prehistoric world, this modpack is stuffed full of prehistoric world generation, decoration and more! This modpack focuses on a wide array of themes, with the ever present bountiful decoration blocks and tools and most import the prehistoric beasts from 65 million blocks ago. So what are you waiting for? Jump into your new adventure today!

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/jurassic-world-reborn)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/jurassic-world-reborn)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)
# Features
- [✔️] **80+ New Biomes** - New Biomes in the Overworld, The Nether, The End and other Dimensions!
- [✔️] **From Fossils To Dinosaurs** - It's time to bring back our prehistoric pals; fossils, DNA, machines and more await you in your revival process.
- [✔️] **Decoration Goodness** - Time to pack your tools, with over 500+ unique decoration blocks and a variety of tools, enjoy decorating your enclosures until your heart is content.

[![Banner Bisecthosting](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Jurassic_World_Reborn/BH_Jurassic_World_Reborn_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/N8tUm6N4Qc)
### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
